heading: Civil liability
label: 1810 Civil liability
notes: Amendments2024—Subsec. (a). amended subsec. (a) generally. Prior to amendment, subsec. (a) read as follows: “actual damages, but not less than liquidated damages of $1,000 or $100 per day for each day of violation, whichever is greater;”.Pub. L. 118–49
amendments: Amendments2024—Subsec. (a). amended subsec. (a) generally. Prior to amendment, subsec. (a) read as follows: “actual damages, but not less than liquidated damages of $1,000 or $100 per day for each day of violation, whichever is greater;”.Pub. L. 118–49

children.text: if the aggrieved person is a United States person, $10,000 or $1,000 per day for each day of violation; or
for any other aggrieved person, $1,000 or $100 per day for each day of violation;

children.label: c
children.text: reasonable attorney’s fees and other investigation and litigation costs reasonably incurred.
